options.description: Detach all others clients to the session
Send SIGHUP to the parent process and detach the client
Attach to a session with the given name

options.description: Indicate that this key may repeat
Attach a note to the key

options.description: Move the window to the next index after
Move the window to the next index before
The new windows does not become the current window
Print information about the new window

Include escape sequences for text and background attributes
Capture only outputs that is the beginning of an as-yet incomplete escape sequence

Preserve trailing spaces at each line's end

Execute the command every time the prompt input changes
Like -l but the key press is translated to a key name
The prompt only accept numeric key press

Tell that the prompt is for a window
Comma-separated list of the initial text for each prompt
Comma-separated list of prompts which are displayed in order

Detach all clients attached to the specified session

Give the x position of the menu
Give the y position of the menu

Do not close the indicator when a key is pressed

Set the size of the new space
